Due to the conjunction of Saturn and Ketu in Aries, the native will pay
little attention to his trade.
The combination ofKetu, the planet of anti-clockwise motion in con
junction with Saturn and the position of Mars in the 12th house to Ketu in the
anti-clockwise direction gave the native a trade in an industrial concern.
Saturn in his transit passes frrst over Rahu's position and then over the
Moon's position. This gives the native professions in medicine and astrology.
